ABS: Publishes anti-lock brake state and brake intervention feedback for chassis and ADAS consumers
ACU: Publishes crash and restraint state so gateway, body, and warning surfaces can react to occupant-safety events
ADM: Publishes automatic door control state for body comfort and access surfaces
AFLS: Publishes adaptive front-lighting state for body lighting and driver-visibility consumers
AHLS: Publishes automatic high-beam lighting state for body lighting and visibility surfaces
ASM: Publishes air-suspension state so chassis and ADAS readers can adapt ride and stability behavior
AVM: Publishes around-view monitor state for parking and display consumers
BAT_BMS: Publishes battery and energy state so propulsion, charging, and display surfaces share one EV health view
BCW: Publishes blind-spot warning state for alert selection and driver warning output
BIO: Publishes biometric authentication state for access and security consumers
BSEC: Publishes body security and alarm state for access, warning, and service visibility
CDC: Publishes damping-control state and diagnostics for chassis health and adaptation readers
CPAY: Publishes connected payment service state for IVI and service-surface readers
CPC: Publishes central propulsion coordination state for downstream powertrain readers
CSM: Publishes cabin sensing state for access, security, and comfort decisions
DATC: Publishes HVAC and climate-control state for comfort-domain and telematics readers
DCDC: Publishes DC-DC converter state for energy distribution and charging-health visibility
DCM: Publishes diagnostic manager state for service routing and diagnostic visibility
DKEY: Publishes digital-key service state for IVI and access-service consumers
DMS: Publishes driver monitoring state so assist and warning logic can react to attention loss
DOOR_FL: Publishes front-left door state for access, security, and comfort visibility
DOOR_FR: Publishes front-right door state for access, security, and comfort visibility
DOOR_RL: Publishes rear-left door state for access, security, and comfort visibility
DOOR_RR: Publishes rear-right door state for access, security, and comfort visibility
ECS: Publishes electronic suspension state for chassis health and downstream ride-control consumers
EDR: Publishes event-data recorder state for fail-safe logging and service readers
EMS: Publishes engine and propulsion health state for vehicle control and display readers
EOP: Publishes oil-pump state for propulsion support and thermal-health visibility
EPB: Publishes parking-brake state and diagnostics for cluster and validation readers
ETHB: Publishes Ethernet backbone state for service routing and link-health visibility
EWP: Publishes electric water-pump state for thermal support and propulsion-health readers
EXT_DIAG: Publishes external diagnostic session state for service routing and workshop ingress
FCA: Publishes forward-collision assist state and request feedback for braking and warning consumers
FCAM: Publishes forward-camera perception state for object-risk and highway-ready decisions
FPCM: Publishes fuel-pump control state for propulsion support and diagnostic visibility
FRADAR: Publishes front-radar perception state for object fusion and assist decisions
HLM: Publishes headlamp-leveling state for lighting visibility and body diagnostics
HUD: Renders selected warning and driver-guidance state into the head-up display surface
HWP: Publishes highway-pilot readiness and state for driver-monitor, cluster, and assist consumers
IBOX: Publishes in-vehicle connectivity hub state for service-link visibility
INVERTER: Publishes inverter state and power-conversion feedback for propulsion-control consumers
ISG: Publishes starter-generator state for propulsion readiness and energy coordination
LCA: Publishes lane-change assist state for warning and driver-guidance outputs
LDR: Publishes lidar perception state for object fusion and path-readiness consumers
LDWS_LKAS: Publishes lane-departure and lane-keeping state for warning and steering-support consumers
LVR: Publishes lever or range-selection state for drive-mode and propulsion coordination
MCU: Publishes motor-control state for torque delivery and EV propulsion coordination
MIR: Publishes mirror state for body comfort and driver-visibility surfaces
MSC: Publishes massage-seat control state for seat comfort and HMI visibility
NAV: Publishes navigation context and route state for zone-aware warning and assist consumers
OBC: Publishes on-board charger state for charging status and energy visibility
ODS: Publishes occupant-detection state for body and gateway safety decisions
OMS: Publishes occupant-monitoring state for body safety and alert decisions
OTA: Publishes over-the-air service state for IVI and backbone service visibility
PAK: Publishes passive-access key state for service and access consumers
PGS: Publishes parking-guidance system state for IVI and parking HMI readers
PKM: Publishes parking-master state for parking-assist orchestration and HMI visibility
PTG: Publishes power-tailgate state for access and body comfort visibility
PUS: Publishes parking-ultrasonic state for parking assist and body or IVI readers
RATC: Publishes rear-climate state for rear-cabin comfort and HMI readers
RPC: Publishes road-preview camera state for ADAS control-adaptation readers
RRM: Publishes rear-radar master state for surround awareness and warning selection
RSE: Publishes rear-seat entertainment state for infotainment service visibility
RSPA: Publishes remote smart parking-assist state for chassis, assist, and display consumers
RWS: Publishes rear-wheel steering state so steering and stability consumers stay aligned
SAS: Publishes steering-angle sensor state for steering control, stability logic, and validation visibility
SEAT_DRV: Publishes driver-seat state for comfort control and HMI visibility
SEAT_PASS: Publishes passenger-seat state for comfort control and HMI visibility
SGW: Publishes secure-gateway state for service routing and access-control visibility
SMK: Publishes smart-key and immobilizer state for access security and validation readers
SPAS: Publishes smart parking-assist state for steering-support and parking HMI consumers
SPM: Publishes surround parking-master state for parking coordination and HMI output
SRF: Publishes sunroof state for comfort control and body visibility
SRR_FL: Publishes front-left corner radar state for surround fusion and parking or lane-assist consumers
SRR_FR: Publishes front-right corner radar state for surround fusion and parking or lane-assist consumers
SRR_RL: Publishes rear-left corner radar state for surround fusion and parking or lane-assist consumers
SRR_RR: Publishes rear-right corner radar state for surround fusion and parking or lane-assist consumers
TCU: Publishes transmission state for longitudinal control and driver-facing vehicle status
TGM: Publishes tailgate state for body access and comfort visibility
TMU: Publishes telematics and remote-service state for IVI, climate, and navigation consumers
TPMS: Publishes tire-pressure and wheel-health state for chassis visibility and warning surfaces
TRM: Publishes trailer-management state for ADAS and vehicle-state consumers
VCS: Publishes voice and connected-speech state for audio and IVI service consumers
WIP: Publishes wiper state and diagnostics for body visibility and warning surfaces
_4WD: Publishes four-wheel-drive engagement state for propulsion coordination and chassis awareness
